final:
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    output reg out
);always @(*) begin
    if ((a & b) | (a & c) | (b & c)) begin
        out <= 1;
    end else begin
        out <= 0;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= ~a & ~b & ~c;
    end
  end

endmodule
